result.reason: Implement a feature to merge multiple mRemoteNG configuration files and provide an option for automatic export.
result.approach: Analyze existing configuration serialization and deserialization processes. Develop a robust merging algorithm to handle multiple configuration sources, including conflict resolution strategies. Implement a mechanism for automatic configuration export based on user-defined triggers or schedules. Integrate new functionality into the application's configuration management system, potentially adding UI elements for user control.
